leadText: Poni Meadow (Japanese: ポニの花園 Poni Flower Garden) is a location on Poni Island in Alola, located northeast of Poni Plains and south of Resolution Cave.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] Poni Meadow is situated in a secluded area, northwest of Poni Plains and south of Resolution Cave . The entrance to Poni Meadow can be accessed from Poni Plains by following the sloped path to the northwest of the signpost. A curtain of purple flowers hangs over the entrance. Inside the meadow there is a field of tall grass to the southeast, directly in front of the entrance. There is fog floating through the air and various objects come into the foreground as the player moves through the area, but it is still possible to see. In the pond to the north there is a fishing spot near the edge of the water. To the west of the tree on the water's edge there is a photo location. Purple Nectar can be found once per day, by the pillar east of the pond and at the top of the first ramp. At the top of the ramp and to the south, a bridge made of tree roots crosses over the pond to the eastern cliff face where some Honey S M or a Power Lens US UM can be obtained. The main path continues to the north, leading to a raised ledge and a series of bridges and platforms. The first bridge crosses east to a platform with a small patch of tall grass . After crossing the second bridge, east of the grass, the path branches off again. The path south leads to a dead end, where TM50 ( Overheat ) can be obtained. To the north is another small patch of grass. Across the fourth bridge and to the northwest is the entrance of Resolution Cave . The ledges to the southeast of the cave lead back to the first bridge to the north. In Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon a Power Herb can be found on the third ledge. Across the roots to the south of the cave, the player can obtain a Power Herb S M / Max Revive US UM . In Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon only, the player can receive TM75 ( Swords Dance ) from Actor Meredith after defeating her here. She will only appear here after being defeated at Melemele Meadow , Royal Avenue , and Ula'ula Meadow .

sections.title: Items
sections.text: Items [ edit | edit source ] Item Location Games Max Potion By the first tree, near the pond US UM Purple Nectar ×2 In front of the pillar on the east side of the first pond (daily) At the top of the ramp on the north side of the first pond (daily) S M US UM Honey Across the bridge of roots over the first pond S M Power Lens Across the bridge of roots over the first pond US UM TM75 ( Swords Dance ) From Actor Meredith for defeating her US UM TM50 ( Overheat ) On a south branch after crossing the two root bridges north of the first pond S M US UM Power Herb In the north, across the roots south of the entrance to Resolution Cave S M Power Herb In the north, on the third ledge southeast of the entrance to Resolution Cave US UM Max Revive In the north, across the roots south of the entrance to Resolution Cave US UM Fishing [ edit | edit source ] Sometimes when fishing , an item will be reeled in instead of a Pokémon. Item Location Games Pearl Randomly reeled in when fishing S M US UM Sticky Barb Randomly reeled in when fishing S M US UM Bottle Cap Randomly reeled in when fishing S M US UM Zygarde Cube [ edit | edit source ] Item Location Games Zygarde Cell In the north, on a ledge south from the entrance to Resolution Cave S M
